docs.title: Commit a3f9b12: fix pgvector index after migration 0050
docs.content:
Commit a3f9b12 in prbe-knowledge
Author: grace
Message: fix(db): rebuild pgvector HNSW index after migration 0050 -- closes DB-19

Migration 0050 dropped and recreated the embeddings table, but forgot to rebuild the HNSW index. This commit adds a post-migration step to CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY on the embedding column. Closes DB-19.

docs.title: DB-19: pgvector ANN queries fall back to seq-scan after migration 0050
docs.content:
Issue DB-19: pgvector ANN queries fall back to sequential scan after migration 0050
Status: Done
Assignee: grace
Description: After running migration 0050 in production, vector search latency jumped from 15ms to 4s. EXPLAIN shows seq-scan instead of HNSW. The index was not rebuilt after the table recreation.

expected_edges.note: Commit message explicitly says 'closes DB-19' and describes the fix for the missing HNSW index rebuild
